description.value:
Weapon and Armor Proficiency Seafaring Companion Wave riders patrol harbors, keeping them safe from dangerous sea creatures and watching for smugglers.

## Weapon and Armor Proficiency

Wave riders are proficient with all simple and martial weapons and with light and medium armor, but not with shields. This replaces the cavalier’s weapon and armor proficiencies. Seafaring Companion At 1st level, a wave rider gains Monstrous Mount as a bonus feat. The wave rider can use this feat only to select a hippocampus mount. Otherwise, this ability functions identically to and replaces the cavalier’s mount ability.
